treatment_information.treatment_response: Hypertension treated with resolution of headache
Admitted for workup of new pleural effusion
Patient was intubated due to difficulty breathing

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with headache and hypertension
Lopressor IV (15 mg) administered in ED
Intubated in ICU for difficulty breathing

patient_outcome.complications: Acute kidney injury on chronic kidney disease
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: BP management required; labile due to renal artery narrowing
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient able to perform household chores, but noted some limitations due to dyspnea
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Asymptomatic despite elevated blood pressure; expressed anxiety
